extractedDraft.summary: Delhi Unified Building Bye-Laws draft extraction based on the DDA Unified Building Bye-Laws for Delhi 2016 Compendium. This draft is prepared only for QA review and is not trusted knowledge.
extractedDraft.applicability: Applies to building approval and development control context for Delhi, subject to competent authority interpretation and current amendments.
extractedDraft.sourceDateOrVersion: Unified Building Bye-Laws for Delhi 2016 Compendium
extractedDraft.buildingApprovalAuthority: Delhi Development Authority / competent local building sanctioning authorities as applicable.

rulesOrByelaws.claim: The source is the Unified Building Bye-Laws for Delhi 2016 compendium used for building regulation and approval reference in Delhi.
rulesOrByelaws.citation: DDA Unified Building Bye-Laws for Delhi 2016 Compendium — https://dda.gov.in/sites/default/files/public-notice/COMPENDIUM_OF_UBBL_201605082020_0.pdf

keyDefinitions.draftMeaning: Rules and regulatory provisions used for building design, approval, construction and related compliance checks.
keyDefinitions.citation: DDA Unified Building Bye-Laws for Delhi 2016 Compendium — https://dda.gov.in/sites/default/files/public-notice/COMPENDIUM_OF_UBBL_201605082020_0.pdf

setbacks.claim: Setback rules should be extracted only after clause-level review of the official source.
setbacks.citation: DDA Unified Building Bye-Laws for Delhi 2016 Compendium — https://dda.gov.in/sites/default/files/public-notice/COMPENDIUM_OF_UBBL_201605082020_0.pdf

heightAndFAR.claim: Height, FAR and coverage rules require clause-level extraction from the official compendium before use.
heightAndFAR.citation: DDA Unified Building Bye-Laws for Delhi 2016 Compendium — https://dda.gov.in/sites/default/files/public-notice/COMPENDIUM_OF_UBBL_201605082020_0.pdf

parking.claim: Parking requirements require clause-level extraction and QA before use.
parking.citation: DDA Unified Building Bye-Laws for Delhi 2016 Compendium — https://dda.gov.in/sites/default/files/public-notice/COMPENDIUM_OF_UBBL_201605082020_0.pdf

fireSafety.claim: Fire and life safety provisions require clause-level extraction and cross-check with applicable codes/authority requirements.
fireSafety.citation: DDA Unified Building Bye-Laws for Delhi 2016 Compendium — https://dda.gov.in/sites/default/files/public-notice/COMPENDIUM_OF_UBBL_201605082020_0.pdf

accessibility.claim: Accessibility provisions require clause-level extraction and QA before use.
accessibility.citation: DDA Unified Building Bye-Laws for Delhi 2016 Compendium — https://dda.gov.in/sites/default/files/public-notice/COMPENDIUM_OF_UBBL_201605082020_0.pdf

submissionChecklist.claim: Submission and approval checklist items must be extracted from relevant official clauses and verified by QA.
submissionChecklist.citation: DDA Unified Building Bye-Laws for Delhi 2016 Compendium — https://dda.gov.in/sites/default/files/public-notice/COMPENDIUM_OF_UBBL_201605082020_0.pdf

limitations: This is a sample extraction draft, not trusted knowledge.
Clause-level values such as FAR, setbacks, height limits, parking ratios and occupancy-specific rules are not finalized in this draft.
Professional/local authority verification is required before use in real projects.
